name: Lentil and Spinach Soup, Adas Bi Sabaanikh (v
recipeIngredient: 1/8 tsp Crushed red hot pepper flake
recipeInstructions:
This is a Middle Eastern soup, typical of the simple foods served in the desert regions. Serve with pita bread and a grain or vegetable dish for a simple meal. This soup is also served cold, stuffed into a pita bread.
1. Place lentils and water in a large pot. Bring to a boil, cover, and cook for 30 minutes over medium low heat.
2. Add onion, tomato paste, and garlic; cook an additional 30 minutes.
3. Add spinach, parsley, and peppers; mix well and cook another 10 minutes.
4. Add lemon juice just before serving. Mix in well and serve at once. Optionally, add fresh ground nutmeg to taste for a slightly sweet flavor. Balsamic vinegar can replace the lemon juice for an alternative sweetness.
